heading: Charles B. Rangel International Affairs Fellowship Program
label: 2665d Charles B. Rangel International Affairs Fellowship Program
notes: DefinitionsFor definition of “Department” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 5002 of Pub. L. 119–60section 2651 of this title

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: a Authorization
children.text: There shall be in the Department a Charles B. Rangel International Affairs Fellowship Program.

children.heading: Purpose
children.label: b Purpose
children.text: The program required by subsection (a) shall continue to recruit and support outstanding individuals from diverse backgrounds to prepare them for careers in the Foreign Service.

children.heading: Administration
children.label: c Administration
children.text: The program required by subsection (a) shall be administered by the Department, consistent with existing law and regulations.
